description: Compound V3 (Comet) is a lending protocol that operates isolated markets for individual base assets (USDC, USDT, WETH), each accepting a curated set of collateral tokens. Unlike Compound V2's shared-pool model, V3 isolates risk per market: suppliers lend a single base asset and borrowers post collateral against it. All three Ethereum markets are upgradeable EIP-1967 proxies controlled by a Compound governance Timelock with a 48-hour delay, with {{totalCapitalAtRisk}} in total capital at risk across all admin-controlled contracts. The protocol depends on Chainlink price feeds and a ConstantPriceFeed for USDT pricing.

eth:0x6d903f6003cca6255d85cca4d3b5e5146d.name: Compound Governance Timelock (48h)
eth:0x6d903f6003cca6255d85cca4d3b5e5146d.description: Central admin of the protocol with a 48-hour execution delay. Controls 40 permissioned functions across 10 contracts, including all market parameter changes (interest rates, collateral factors, supply caps, reserve targets), asset listing via addAsset/updateAsset, price feed configuration, factory and extension delegate settings, governor transfer, and reserve withdrawals via withdrawReserves and approveThis. Also owns the CometProxyAdmin, giving it indirect upgrade authority over all three market proxies. Governed by CompoundGovernor, which routes COMP token holder votes through this timelock. Controls {{timelockDirectCapital}} in direct capital exposure.

eth:0x1ec63b5883c3481134fd50d5daebc83ecd.name: CometProxyAdmin
eth:0x1ec63b5883c3481134fd50d5daebc83ecd.description: Immutable proxy admin contract owned by the Governance Timelock. Can upgrade, deploy-and-upgrade, and change the admin of the three market proxy contracts (cUSDCv3, cUSDTv3, cWETHv3) via upgrade, upgradeAndCall, deployAndUpgradeTo, deployUpgradeToAndCall, and changeProxyAdmin. Controls {{proxyAdminDirectCapital}} in direct capital across the three market contracts.

eth:0xbbf3f1421d886e9b2c5d716b5192ac998a.name: Pause Guardian 5/8 Multisig
eth:0xbbf3f1421d886e9b2c5d716b5192ac998a.description: A 5-of-8 Gnosis Safe multisig that serves as the pause guardian for the cUSDCv3 and cUSDTv3 markets. Can call pause to halt supply, transfer, withdraw, absorb, and buyCollateral operations without timelock delay. One of its 8 signers is itself a 2/7 multisig (0xeB5f...d627). Controls {{pauseGuardianDirectCapital}} in direct capital exposure. Cannot unpause markets or modify any other parameters.

eth:0x309a862bbc1a00e45506cb8a802d1ff100.name: CompoundGovernor
eth:0x309a862bbc1a00e45506cb8a802d1ff100.description: Upgradeable on-chain governance contract (EIP-1967 proxy) that serves as the admin of the Timelock. COMP token holders submit and vote on proposals, which are then queued and executed through the Timelock with a 48-hour delay. The governor contract itself is upgradeable via a separate ProxyAdmin also owned by the Timelock, meaning governance can upgrade its own governor implementation.

eth:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
eth:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000.description: The zero address appears as pendingAdmin on the Timelock, indicating no pending admin transfer is in progress. This permission is effectively inactive.

eth:0x8ffffffd4afb6115b954bd326cbe7b4ba5.name: Chainlink USDC/USD Price Feed
eth:0x8ffffffd4afb6115b954bd326cbe7b4ba5.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy providing the USDC/USD price feed for the cUSDCv3 market. Used in absorb (liquidation), buyCollateral, transfer, supply, supplyFrom, and withdraw operations to value collateral and base assets. Owned by a Chainlink 4/9 multisig.

eth:0xd72ac1bce9177cfe7aeb5d0516a38c88a6.name: ConstantPriceFeed (USDT)
eth:0xd72ac1bce9177cfe7aeb5d0516a38c88a6.description: An immutable contract that returns a constant price, used as the base token price feed for the cUSDTv3 market. Referenced by 9 functions including absorb, buyCollateral, transfer, supply, and withdraw. Since USDT is the base asset, a constant $1 price avoids oracle dependency for the base token itself.

eth:0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce36.name: Circle USDC Token
eth:0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce36.description: The USDC stablecoin contract, which is the base asset of the cUSDCv3 market. It is an upgradeable ZeppelinOS proxy controlled by Circle. Used in 9 functions including approveThis, buyCollateral, supply, and withdraw. Circle can freeze, blacklist, or upgrade the USDC contract, which would directly impact the cUSDCv3 market.

eth:0xc02aaa39b223fe8d0a0e5c4f27ead9083c.name: Wrapped Ether (WETH)
eth:0xc02aaa39b223fe8d0a0e5c4f27ead9083c.description: The WETH token contract, used as collateral in the cUSDTv3 market. Referenced by 8 functions including buyCollateral, supply, supplyFrom, and withdraw. WETH is immutable and has no admin controls.

eth:0x21f73d42eb58ba49ddb685dc29d3bf5c0f.name: Chainlink 4/9 Multisig
eth:0x21f73d42eb58ba49ddb685dc29d3bf5c0f.description: A 4-of-9 Gnosis Safe that owns the Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy. Can change the underlying aggregator address, which would affect all price-dependent operations in the cUSDCv3 market. This is a standard Chainlink operations multisig.

eth:0xc3d688b66703497daa19211eedff47f253.name: cUSDCv3 Market
eth:0xc3d688b66703497daa19211eedff47f253.description: The main Compound V3 USDC lending market. Holds {{cusdcv3Balance}} in deposited assets including USDC (base), WBTC, wstETH, WETH, LINK, UNI, COMP, cbBTC, weETH, tBTC, and rsETH collateral. This is the largest Compound V3 market by TVL.

eth:0xa17581a9e3356d9a858b789d68b4d866e5.name: cUSDTv3 Market
eth:0xa17581a9e3356d9a858b789d68b4d866e5.description: The Compound V3 USDT lending market. Holds {{cusdtv3Balance}} in deposited assets including USDT (base), wstETH, ezETH, WETH, rsETH, weETH, tETH, and other ETH-derivative collateral tokens.

eth:0xc00e94cb662c3520282e6f5717214004a7.name: COMP Governance Token
eth:0xc00e94cb662c3520282e6f5717214004a7.description: The Compound governance token used for voting in CompoundGovernor proposals. Has a market capitalization of {{compMarketCap}}.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
